overview: The strongest supportive currents come through Guru and Ketu. Pressure points are tied to Shani and Rahu and need measured handling.
yearlyTheme: For those born under the Leo zodiac sign, the Telugu year Sri Parabhava (from March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027) promises largely favorable results due to the influence of Jupiter. Until May 31, 2026, Jupiter will facilitate the acquisition of wealth through righteous means and help you cultivate a new circle of loyal, high-minded friends who will foster spiritual growth and bring good fortune. Those aspiring for children will likely see their wishes fulfilled, though there may be a slight dip in the determination required to complete tasks. This is an auspicious time for Leo women to enter their husbands' professional or business ventures, though care should be taken as starting multiple projects simultaneously may lead to a lack of follow-through. While humanitarian values will rise, the period between June 1, 2026, and October 30, 2026, may see expenses exceeding income, even as those in the gemstone trade find success. Unmarried men may find a wealthy life partner during this time, and long-distance or foreign travel plans are likely to succeed, despite a tendency toward behavioral excess and overspending. From October 31, 2026, to January 23, 2027, career prospects will reach new heights—though politicians should guard against an increased thirst for power—and general success will follow every endeavor. Finally, from January 24, 2027, until the end of the year, divine grace will ensure a comfortable life, making this an ideal year to acquire fixed assets like a home or land.
opportunities: For those born under the Leo zodiac sign, the Telugu year Sri Parabhava (from March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027) promises largely favorable results due to the influence of Jupiter. This is an auspicious time for Leo women to enter their husbands' professional or business ventures, though care should be taken as starting multiple projects simultaneously may lead to a lack of follow-through.
caution: For those born under the Leo zodiac sign, the influence of Ketu during the Sri Parabhava year will result in severe unfavorable outcomes until December 4, 2026. During this period, the health of young children may become a source of significant concern, and young men may experience persistent mental anxiety regarding relationships with women.

From October 31, 2026, to January 23, 2027, career prospects will reach new heights—though politicians should guard against an increased thirst for power—and general success will follow every endeavor.
familyRelationships: Those aspiring for children will likely see their wishes fulfilled, though there may be a slight dip in the determination required to complete tasks. During this period, the health of young children may become a source of significant concern, and young men may experience persistent mental anxiety regarding relationships with women.
healthWellbeing: For those born under the Leo zodiac sign, the year Sri Parabhava will bring challenging results throughout the year due to the influence of Saturn, particularly regarding health, marital life, and conflicts with adversaries. You may frequently encounter misfortune in your career or daily life and might face situations leading to humiliation from others; specifically, those born under the Pubba Nakshatra should be extra cautious as they may face frequent health setbacks.
blessing: Overall, for those born under the Leo zodiac sign, the year Sri Parabhava offers favorable results solely due to the influence of Jupiter, while Saturn, Rahu, and Ketu present various challenges and obstacles. Depending on the severity of the problems encountered, it is highly recommended to perform specific remedial measures (Shanti) and Vedic chants (Japa) for Saturn, Rahu, and Ketu to mitigate their negative effects and seek relief.

planetaryInfluences.summary: For those born under the Leo zodiac sign, the Telugu year Sri Parabhava (from March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027) promises largely favorable results due to the influence of Jupiter. Until May 31, 2026, Jupiter will facilitate the acquisition of wealth through righteous means and help you cultivate a new circle of loyal, high-minded friends who will foster spiritual growth and bring good fortune. Those aspiring for children will likely see their wishes fulfilled, though there may be a slight dip in the determination required to complete tasks. This is an auspicious time for Leo women to enter their husbands' professional or business ventures, though care should be taken as starting multiple projects simultaneously may lead to a lack of follow-through. While humanitarian values will rise, the period between June 1, 2026, and October 30, 2026, may see expenses exceeding income, even as those in the gemstone trade find success. Unmarried men may find a wealthy life partner during this time, and long-distance or foreign travel plans are likely to succeed, despite a tendency toward behavioral excess and overspending. From October 31, 2026, to January 23, 2027, career prospects will reach new heights—though politicians should guard against an increased thirst for power—and general success will follow every endeavor. Finally, from January 24, 2027, until the end of the year, divine grace will ensure a comfortable life, making this an ideal year to acquire fixed assets like a home or land.

For those born under the Leo zodiac sign, the year Sri Parabhava will bring challenging results throughout the year due to the influence of Saturn, particularly regarding health, marital life, and conflicts with adversaries. You may frequently encounter misfortune in your career or daily life and might face situations leading to humiliation from others; specifically, those born under the Pubba Nakshatra should be extra cautious as they may face frequent health setbacks. To mitigate these effects, it is recommended that Leos observe a fast during the daytime on Saturdays and regularly chant the Shani Mantra:

For those born under the Leo zodiac sign, the influence of Rahu during the Sri Parabhava year will largely bring unfavorable results, with the sole exception being matters related to ancestral property or inheritance where your desires may be fulfilled. However, you may have to pay a heavy price due to personal mistakes regarding your spouse or marital life. Specifically, those whose individual horoscopes contain Rahu-based Kalatra Dosha or severe Kala Sarpa Dosha face indications of potential loss or severe strain in their marital relationship. Significant health issues may also arise during this period. To alleviate these negative effects, it is highly recommended to daily chant the Rahu Mantra:

For those born under the Leo zodiac sign, the influence of Ketu during the Sri Parabhava year will result in severe unfavorable outcomes until December 4, 2026. During this period, the health of young children may become a source of significant concern, and young men may experience persistent mental anxiety regarding relationships with women. However, from December 5, 2026, onwards, these negative effects will begin to subside, leading to a decrease in stressful situations. Specifically, those born under the Makha Nakshatra will have the opportunity to lead or organize significant virtuous deeds and auspicious events. Additionally, elderly Leo natives can look forward to successful pilgrimages and the spiritual rewards associated with visiting holy sites.

monthlyHighlights.summary: This month, students can look forward to resounding success in their endeavors. Those venturing into new businesses will see excellent financial gains, while professionals will find opportunities for easy income generation. However, those in service or employment will experience mixed results, potentially facing friction with superiors and finding that their hard work doesn't yield the expected rewards. Additionally, challenges may arise due to colleagues. While the second and third weeks will bring mediocre results, a significant matter may encounter obstacles toward the end of the month. It is advised to be cautious on the 19th, 20th, 25th, 26th, and 27th, as these dates are not particularly favorable.

This month, you will enjoy significant financial gains, and it is an ideal time for acquiring real estate or housing assets. Efforts toward securing a new job will be successful. Your desires to visit sacred Shiva temples will be fulfilled, and you will gain the spiritual merit of listening to Puranic discourses. There will be an increase in wealth and grain from agricultural sources. Specifically, those born under the Uttara Nakshatra will find success in their efforts toward earning foreign income. You will receive opportunities that match your talent, and there is potential for profit through government sources. While you will earn great respect and honor within the family, happiness in marital life may be somewhat lacking. The youth will be able to make wise decisions regarding their life's journey, and women will see their bonds with their maternal side strengthen. Those who have a favorably placed Jupiter in their personal horoscope will witness auspicious family growth. The final week of the month indicates the purchase of valuable jewelry or items. However, please note that the 10th, 11th, and 12th of this month are not favorable.

This month, expenses will be slightly high, and you may face sudden financial losses. In times of emergency, the expected support or financial help from your own people may not materialize. Caution is advised regarding new acquaintances made this month, as they may not provide the anticipated benefits. On a positive note, you will achieve success in legal matters and gain the upper hand in disputes. Employees have good prospects for promotions, and your innovative thinking will yield profits. From the start of the third week, funds will become available as needed; however, physical exertion will increase, and you may find yourself lacking comfortable or timely meals. For those seeking marriage, the 24th, 25th, 28th, and 29th are favorable dates for making efforts. Please remain vigilant, as there are indications of potential trouble from theft, fire, or physical ailments.

This month, efforts related to acquiring a new home will be successful, and prospects in both employment and business remain encouraging. Individuals from all walks of life can expect a healthy financial inflow, supplemented by the anticipated support from sisters or female relatives. You will receive invitations from prominent individuals, and property disputes are likely to be resolved in your favor. This is an ideal time to consult family elders regarding inheritance matters, as family support is strongly indicated. The mid-month period will bring satisfying events, allowing you to complete your tasks with ease. It is an auspicious time to launch new business ventures, and all types of buying and selling transactions will prove profitable. Contract employees in the government sector may achieve job stability. While students will face increased competition and responsibilities in their careers, the month may also bring distressing news regarding the serious ill-health of a young relative. Please exercise extra caution regarding vehicles on the 3rd, 4th, and 5th.

This month, financial income will be favorable, and you will be able to clear long-standing debts related to your children. Newlyweds seeking to start a family will find their efforts successful. However, the second week may bring some loss of reputation or embarrassment due to family members, and interference from outsiders in family matters could lead to disputes. It is highly advisable to avoid discussing your private family affairs with friends. Romantic involvements may cause mental unrest during this period. A positive shift will begin after the 19th, and those currently unemployed may discover independent business opportunities for earning. While your tactful speech will help you navigate and escape problems, the period between the 20th and 25th is not an auspicious time for entering into new financial agreements, conducting sales and purchases, or attempting to change jobs.

This month, an environment conducive to resolving disputes amicably will emerge. Efforts to change your professional life will be favorable, and those aspiring for jobs abroad will finally see their long-cherished dreams fulfilled. Your home will be filled with the bustle of auspicious celebrations. Farmers can look forward to an increase in livestock, grain, and overall agricultural wealth. However, those born under the Pubba Nakshatra may face physical illness, unproductive labor, obstacles in their tasks, and a high-stress lifestyle during the second and third weeks. Women, in particular, may find themselves in situations where they must fight a lonely battle to uphold family values, and ironically, your high moral standards might pose a challenge to your personal progress. In the final week, expenses exceeding your budget may lead to mental irritation, and marital matters could prove disappointing. Business activities will continue at a mediocre pace.

This month, you may face sudden disputes with well-known individuals or neighbors, or experience losses because of them. Elderly individuals should be cautious as health issues are likely, leading to medical expenses. Legal matters will proceed on a disappointing note, and this is not a favorable time for making changes to your home. Those in the business sector will encounter negative results; it is advisable not to rely too heavily on mediators and instead seek professional legal advice for your transactions. You might find yourself postponing important tasks, and the second half of the month indicates signs of intense pressure or even potential job loss. Efforts to move your plans forward may stall. Please note that the 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 13th, 20th, and 29th of this month are not favorable dates.

This month continues to show less than favorable results. Business activities will not progress as expected, and new investments may lead to losses. Financial income will be low, or you may find it difficult to save money. Those searching for jobs may face disappointment, and friends might fail to keep their promises. The behavior of family members could also become a cause for concern, and you may struggle to maintain focus on your intended tasks. Young women might suffer from feelings of low self-esteem. However, conditions will begin to improve after the 23rd, providing new opportunities to stabilize financially and offering technical assistance for your projects. It is advisable to postpone travels this month. For students, the final week looks favorable, but those pursuing foreign opportunities may face financial hurdles. Politicians might encounter legal disputes or threats to their positions. Above all, extreme caution is required regarding animosity within the relative circle.

This month, your financial income will see a significant increase as the negative influences of the past two months begin to subside. For those who are unmarried, efforts toward marriage will finally be successful. Through the timely intervention of elders, ongoing disputes with your life partner will be resolved, restoring harmony. You will be able to complete your tasks on schedule, earning the admiration of others and increasing your importance at your workplace. This period also marks the beginning of long-term growth for your family. From the third week onward, you will experience great mental cheer and joy in your marital life. Your status and reputation in society will rise, and you will successfully manage and complete major auspicious events or ceremonies under your direct leadership.

This month, the steady flow of financial income will continue, and business affairs will progress favorably as planned. You will be successful in recovering long-standing dues or bad debts. A joyful atmosphere will prevail at home, especially through quality time spent with your children. This is an excellent month to put your new ideas into action, and funds will become available exactly when needed. Your professional life will remain honorable, and your hard work will receive the recognition it deserves.

This month, you will encounter high family-related expenses and potential health issues caused by insects or minor infections. Efforts to enter new professional fields may face obstacles. However, spending time with loved ones will bring much-needed peace of mind. You may have to undertake physically demanding travels, and there are signs of a lack of focus in achieving your goals. Your interest in entertainment will increase, but be cautious, as gambling or speculative activities could lead to financial losses. While you will find yourself extremely busy with little free time, you will be able to complete important tasks after the 16th. This period is highly favorable for drafting future plans and strategies.

This month, you will see the desired positive changes in your profession and career. With strong self-confidence, you will pave your own path toward success and encounter excellent opportunities to increase your earnings. You will also contribute your part to divine or spiritual activities. Financial income remains strong, and your daily routine will proceed smoothly. However, efforts related to marriage and starting a family will yield mixed results during this period. Additionally, this month is not very favorable for paternal relatives. Please note that the 8th, 9th, 17th, 18th, and 20th are not auspicious; it is better to postpone important matters on these specific dates.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
